AssociateToConfiguration.name: AssociateToConfiguration
AssociateToConfiguration.description: Grants permission to associate a resource with a configuration

CreateChimeWebhookConfiguration.name: CreateChimeWebhookConfiguration
CreateChimeWebhookConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Chatbot Chime Webhook Configuration

CreateCustomAction.name: CreateCustomAction
CreateCustomAction.description: Grants permission to create a custom action

CreateMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration.name: CreateMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration
CreateMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Chatbot Microsoft Teams Channel Configuration

CreateSlackChannelConfiguration.name: CreateSlackChannelConfiguration
CreateSlackChannelConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Chatbot Slack Channel Configuration

DeleteChimeWebhookConfiguration.name: DeleteChimeWebhookConfiguration
DeleteChimeWebhookConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Chatbot Chime Webhook Configuration

DeleteCustomAction.name: DeleteCustomAction
DeleteCustomAction.description: Grants permission to delete a custom action

DeleteMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration.name: DeleteMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration
DeleteMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Chatbot Microsoft Teams Channel Configuration

DeleteMicrosoftTeamsConfiguredTeam.name: DeleteMicrosoftTeamsConfiguredTeam
DeleteMicrosoftTeamsConfiguredTeam.description: Grants permission to delete the Microsoft Teams configured with AWS Chatbot in an AWS account

DeleteMicrosoftTeamsUserIdentity.name: DeleteMicrosoftTeamsUserIdentity
DeleteMicrosoftTeamsUserIdentity.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Chatbot Microsoft Teams User Identity

DeleteSlackChannelConfiguration.name: DeleteSlackChannelConfiguration
DeleteSlackChannelConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Chatbot Slack Channel Configuration

DeleteSlackUserIdentity.name: DeleteSlackUserIdentity
DeleteSlackUserIdentity.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Chatbot Slack User Identity

DeleteSlackWorkspaceAuthorization.name: DeleteSlackWorkspaceAuthorization
DeleteSlackWorkspaceAuthorization.description: Grants permission to delete the Slack workspace authorization with AWS Chatbot, associated with an AWS account

DescribeChimeWebhookConfigurations.name: DescribeChimeWebhookConfigurations
DescribeChimeWebhookConfigurations.description: Grants permission to list all AWS Chatbot Chime Webhook Configurations in an AWS Account

DescribeSlackChannelConfigurations.name: DescribeSlackChannelConfigurations
DescribeSlackChannelConfigurations.description: Grants permission to list all AWS Chatbot Slack Channel Configurations in an AWS account

DescribeSlackChannels.name: DescribeSlackChannels
DescribeSlackChannels.description: Grants permission to list all public Slack channels in the Slack workspace connected to the AWS Account onboarded with AWS Chatbot service

DescribeSlackUserIdentities.name: DescribeSlackUserIdentities
DescribeSlackUserIdentities.description: Grants permission to describe AWS Chatbot Slack User Identities

DescribeSlackWorkspaces.name: DescribeSlackWorkspaces
DescribeSlackWorkspaces.description: Grants permission to list all authorized Slack workspaces connected to the AWS Account onboarded with AWS Chatbot service

DisassociateFromConfiguration.name: DisassociateFromConfiguration
DisassociateFromConfiguration.description: Grants permission to disassociate a resource from a configuration

GetAccountPreferences.name: GetAccountPreferences
GetAccountPreferences.description: Grants permission to retrieve AWS Chatbot account preferences

GetCustomAction.name: GetCustomAction
GetCustomAction.description: Grants permission to get a custom action

GetMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration.name: GetMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration
GetMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get a single AWS Chatbot Microsoft Teams Channel Configurations in an AWS account

GetMicrosoftTeamsOauthParameters.name: GetMicrosoftTeamsOauthParameters
GetMicrosoftTeamsOauthParameters.description: Grants permission to generate OAuth parameters to request Microsoft Teams OAuth code to be used by the AWS Chatbot service

GetSlackOauthParameters.name: GetSlackOauthParameters
GetSlackOauthParameters.description: Grants permission to generate OAuth parameters to request Slack OAuth code to be used by the AWS Chatbot service

ListAssociations.name: ListAssociations
ListAssociations.description: Grants permission to list resources associated with a configuration

ListCustomActions.name: ListCustomActions
ListCustomActions.description: Grants permission to list custom actions

ListMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfigurations.name: ListMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfigurations
ListMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfigurations.description: Grants permission to list all AWS Chatbot Microsoft Teams Channel Configurations in an AWS account

ListMicrosoftTeamsConfiguredTeams.name: ListMicrosoftTeamsConfiguredTeams
ListMicrosoftTeamsConfiguredTeams.description: Grants permission to list all Microsoft Teams connected to the AWS Account onboarded with AWS Chatbot service

ListMicrosoftTeamsUserIdentities.name: ListMicrosoftTeamsUserIdentities
ListMicrosoftTeamsUserIdentities.description: Grants permission to describe AWS Chatbot Microsoft Teams User Identities

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to List all tags associated with the AWS Chatbot Channel Configuration

RedeemMicrosoftTeamsOauthCode.name: RedeemMicrosoftTeamsOauthCode
RedeemMicrosoftTeamsOauthCode.description: Grants permission to redeem previously generated parameters with Microsoft APIs, to acquire OAuth tokens to be used by the AWS Chatbot service

RedeemSlackOauthCode.name: RedeemSlackOauthCode
RedeemSlackOauthCode.description: Grants permission to redeem previously generated parameters with Slack API, to acquire OAuth tokens to be used by the AWS Chatbot service

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.description: Grants permission to create tags on AWS Chatbot Channel Configuration

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags on AWS Chatbot Channel Configuration

UpdateAccountPreferences.name: UpdateAccountPreferences
UpdateAccountPreferences.description: Grants permission to update AWS Chatbot account preferences

UpdateChimeWebhookConfiguration.name: UpdateChimeWebhookConfiguration
UpdateChimeWebhookConfiguration.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Chatbot Chime Webhook Configuration

UpdateCustomAction.name: UpdateCustomAction
UpdateCustomAction.description: Grants permission to update a custom action

UpdateMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration.name: UpdateMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration
UpdateMicrosoftTeamsChannelConfiguration.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Chatbot Microsoft Teams Channel Configuration

UpdateSlackChannelConfiguration.name: UpdateSlackChannelConfiguration
UpdateSlackChannelConfiguration.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Chatbot Slack Channel Configuration

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}
aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.name: aws:TagKeys
aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
